mapper.update: UPDATE iam_menu_field SET deleted = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(6), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%m'), version = version + 1 WHERE field_code = #{fieldCode} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE iam_menu_field SET deleted = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(6), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s%m'), version = version + 1 WHERE menu_code = #{menuCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT mf.id, mf.app_code, mf.menu_code, mf.field_code, af.field_name, af.json_path, af.action, af.mask_rule, af.api_code, a.api_method, a.api_uri, a.api_name FROM iam_menu_field mf LEFT JOIN iam_api_field af ON af.field_code = mf.field_code AND af.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN iam_api a ON a.api_code = af.api_code AND a.deleted = 0 WHERE mf.deleted = 0 AND mf.menu_code = #{menuCode} ORDER BY mf.id ASC
